title: Kraken launches crypto debit card in UK and Europe
message_html: Kraken launches crypto debit card in UK and Europe ...
snippet: Kraken has introduced a Mastercard debit card in the UK and Europe that lets users spend hundreds of crypto and cash currencies.

title: Japan's largest security token platform moves nearly $3 billion to Avalanche blockchain
message_html: Japan's largest security token platform moves nearly $3 billion to Avalanche blockchain ...
snippet: Progmat develops security token infrastructure that accounts for 64.6% of Japan’s security token market total issuance value.
